description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a slim, matte black bezel. The screen is supported by a sturdy, circular pedestal stand that connects to the rear of the monitor via a vertical arm. The back of the monitor is smooth and unadorned, with a subtle seam running horizontally across the upper section. The side profile reveals the monitor's thin depth and the robust construction of the stand, which provides stability. No physical buttons, ports, or branding are visible on any side of the monitor. The overall design is minimalist and modern, suitable for office or public urban environments.
description: A sleek, flat-panel computer monitor with a slim black bezel and a circular pedestal stand, featuring a minimalist, modern design with no visible buttons or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat display framed by a thin black bezel and the circular base of the stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile and the vertical arm connecting the screen to the round base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unmarked back panel and the full structure of the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again showing the thin depth and the robust, circular stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is slim, matte black, with a uniform thickness around the display and slightly rounded corners, providing a clean, modern look with no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a circular pedestal base connected to the monitor by a straight, vertical arm, all in matte black plastic or metal, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
